Declared templates nothing injects warn instead of silently loading.
-- go.mod --
module app

go 1.26

require github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/templates v0.0.0

replace github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/templates => TEMPLATEDIR
-- main.go --
package main

func main() {
	if err := run(); err != nil {
		panic(err)
	}
}
-- web/templates.go --
package web

import (
	"embed"
	"net/http"
)

//fabrik:templates
//go:embed all:templates
var Templates embed.FS

//fabrik:http GET /
func Home(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {}
-- web/templates/_default/_layout.html --
<html>{{ block "content" . }}{{ end }}</html>
-- web/templates/_default/home.html --
{{ define "content" }}ok{{ end }}
-- want/main.gen.go --
// Code generated by fabrik. DO NOT EDIT.
// Regenerate with: fabrik wire

package main

import (
	"context"
	"errors"
	"net/http"
	"os"
	"os/signal"
	"sync/atomic"
	"syscall"
	"time"

	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/router"

	"app/web"
)

func run() (err error) {
	ctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(context.Background())
	defer cancel()

	var signaled atomic.Bool
	sigc := make(chan os.Signal, 2)
	signal.Notify(sigc, os.Interrupt, syscall.SIGTERM)
	defer signal.Stop(sigc)
	go func() {
		<-sigc
		signaled.Store(true)
		cancel()
		<-sigc
		os.Exit(1)
	}()

	var shutdownWaits []func(context.Context) error
	defer func() {
		cancel()
		drainCtx, drainCancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 30*time.Second)
		defer drainCancel()
		var drainErr error
		for _, wait := range shutdownWaits {
			if e := wait(drainCtx); e != nil && drainErr == nil {
				drainErr = e
			}
		}
		if signaled.Load() && errors.Is(err, context.Canceled) {
			err = nil
		}
		if err == nil {
			err = drainErr
		}
	}()

	// Providers
	r := router.New()

	// Register
	r.Method("GET", "/", web.Home)

	// Serve
	addr := ":8080"
	if p := os.Getenv("PORT"); p != "" {
		addr = ":" + p
	}
	srv := &http.Server{Addr: addr, Handler: r}
	errc := make(chan error, 1)
	go func() { errc <- srv.ListenAndServe() }()
	select {
	case err := <-errc:
		if errors.Is(err, http.ErrServerClosed) {
			return nil
		}
		return err
	case <-ctx.Done():
	}
	shutdownCtx, shutdownCancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 10*time.Second)
	defer shutdownCancel()
	return srv.Shutdown(shutdownCtx)
}
-- want/diags --
warning: web/templates.go:8:1: templates Templates are never used
  help: inject *templates.Set into a handler struct or provider, or remove the directive
